'''''Urjani''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Neutron Star-class bulk cruiser/Legends|''Neutron Star'']]-class [[Bulk cruiser/Legends|Bulk Cruiser]] that was destroyed by the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. It was a part of the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] ''[[Independence/Legends|Independence]]''{{'s}} task force at [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] prior to its destruction.<ref name="XWA" />

{{Ship-stub}}
